sign_in_subtitle: Sign in to your account and continue your journey.
verify_email_message: Please verify your email. Click "Resend OTP" to get a new code.
join_learners_desc:
Join thousands of learners building consistency and
growing their programming skills — one commit at a time.
forgot_password_desc: We'll email you a link to reset your password.
reset_password_subtitle: Your new password must be different. Please enter the OTP sent to your email.
verify_otp_desc: We sent a verification code to your email address. Enter it below to continue.
